new_claims.claim_text: Iran has just attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil building as retaliation for Trump and Israel coordinating an attack against iran’s energy infrastructure.
US and Israel bomb petrochemical facilities in Iran.
Al Jazeera confirms the US and Israel have bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran.
new_claims.notes: Unverified, highly inflammatory claim, citing Al Jazeera.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
Automated sheep shearing video is 'Japan technology'.
new_claims.notes: Claim is contested by another user stating the video is AI-generated and fake.
